name: Mushrooms in Garlic Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Add 1/2 teaspoon chopped fresh rosemary or 1/4 teaspoon dried rosemary leaves, crushed to a can of condensed French-Onion Soup.
2. Stir in 1/4 teaspoon dried thyme leaves, crushed and 1/2 teaspoon lime juice.
3. Pour in 1/4 cup dry white wine or dry sherry.
4. In a 6-quart Dutch oven over medium heat, heat the olive oil.
5. Cook the onion until tender, then add garlic, rosemary, and thyme.
6. Increase heat to medium-high and add mushrooms. Cook until they begin to brown.
7. Stir in the soup, lime juice, and wine. Bring to a boil.
8. Reduce heat to low and simmer until mushrooms are tender, stirring occasionally.
9. Sprinkle with chopped fresh parsley.
10. Garnish with fresh rosemary and lime slice, if desired. Serve with meat, rice, or noodles. Makes about 2 3/4 cups.
